middlewares.title: Routing middlewares
middlewares.description: External HTTP middlewares consulted before ai-client selects a routed model.

id.title: Middleware id
id.description: Stable unique identifier for this routing middleware.

url.title: Middleware URL
url.description: HTTP endpoint that classifies a parsed query and returns whether a small or large model should be used.

models.title: Classification model mapping
models.description: Maps middleware classification results to concrete routed model ids.

small.title: Small model
small.description: Concrete model id to use when the middleware returns "small".

large.title: Large model
large.description: Concrete model id to use when the middleware returns "large".
